items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Digest mode (daily summary vs realtime)'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how this scenario is implemented or tested. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps in the implementation.
